hero.title: Creative Portfolio
hero.intro: I craft elegant, high-performing digital works that blend research, creative analysis, system thinking, and user-centered design.

feed.title: Minimalist Furniture Design
feed.description: An exploration of functional minimalism. Analyzing structural balance and modern aesthetic theories using warm oakwood and welded steel frames.
feed.featuredDesc: An exploration of functional minimalism combining warm oakwood and welded steel frames.

feed.title: Symbolism in Modern Poetry
feed.description: A literary thesis decoding hidden linguistic structures and metaphorical frameworks in mid-century expressionist poems.
feed.featuredDesc: A literary analysis decoding hidden linguistic structures in mid-century expressionist poems.

feed.title: Financial Market Trends
feed.description: A data-driven deep dive into systemic interest rate changes and their cascading effects on seed-stage technology investments.
feed.featuredDesc: A data-driven deep dive into interest rate changes and seed-stage technology investments.
